---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way? A clear description
of the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they fall short.

## Fit with Nabu's design

Please check this against the project's constraints before proposing
(see `CONTRIBUTING.md` and `ROADMAP.md`):

- [ ] Keeps `cli/*` zero-dependency (no new npm packages / build step in the CLI)
- [ ] Preserves privacy invariants (`private`/`vault` never leave for third-party
      APIs or logs)
- [ ] Schema changes, if any, are additive only
- [ ] Doesn't require a broad "do anything" tool
- [ ] Consistent with dark-theme-only, Russian UI

If your idea is already listed in `ROADMAP.md` (including consciously deferred
items), please reference it here.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or examples.
